As Seen In

KRANK is redefining the modern workshop — delivering rugged tools with the right touch of tech to boost precision, efficiency, and control.
Built like a tank, balanced like a pro — KRANK tools are made to endure, built for precision, and ready to match your grind.
A rising brand gaining traction with pros and serious DIYers alike — KRANK stands out for rugged performance, smart design, and reputation.
Tough, clean, and brutally efficient — KRANK proves power tools never have to choose between strength and design. They deliver both with ease.
KRANK delivers pro-level performance without the pro-level price tag — a smart, reliable pick for weekend warriors and DIYers who demand more.
From torque to battery life, KRANK checks every box — built to meet the demands of modern DIYers with power, precision, and reliability.
KRANK tools are the kind you keep in your kit forever — built to last, built for impact, and ready for the serious tasks that demand serious hardware.
KRANK gives home users access to pro-grade tools — easy to handle, tough enough for heavy-duty jobs, and built to last through years of use.

What the Pros Say

Real feedback from real users who rely on Krank to get the job done.
  • Krank tools feel solid and precise. Easy to handle, and powerful enough for all my workshop needs.
    Danielle M.
  • Every cut needs to be precise—and Krank tools give me that control. Smooth, solid, and always reliable.
    Marco G.
  • Cutting feels effortless with Krank. The grip, the control—it’s exactly what I need for clean, accurate work.
    Lena K.
  • Fast, clean, and consistent. Krank’s drill delivers pro-level precision without the bulk.
    Jason T.
  • Lightweight but powerful—perfect for home projects. Krank makes every task feel easier.
    Nina L.
  • Krank sanders give me total control—smooth finishes, zero hassle. It’s a must-have in my workshop.
    Elliot R.
